step_rationale: Complement cascade activation amplifies local inflammation and thrombus formation.
mechanism: Central complement component driving local inflammatory amplification and thrombus-associated innate immune activation.

references.title: Costunolide Reduces DN Inflammatory Response and Renal Thrombosis by Inhibiting NET Formation.
Local complement activation triggers neutrophil recruitment to the site of thrombus formation in acute myocardial infarction.
Processing of serum proteins underlies the mass spectral fingerprinting of myocardial infarction.
